question: Pick a spot in El Segundo. Win if you match the most-popular pick.
dek: A Schelling-point poll. Imagine you have to meet someone in El Segundo with no other context — no time, no message, just "meet me there". Pick the spot you think most other readers will pick.

options.label: Old Town Music Hall
options.hint: 140 Richmond St — silent-film theater, organ inside, hard not to find.

options.label: El Segundo Beach pier area
options.hint: Where Grand Ave hits the strand. The obvious sea-meets-town point.

options.label: The Point
options.hint: Outdoor center, Sepulveda + Park Place. Has a clock tower.

options.label: Smoky Hollow brewery
options.hint: El Segundo Brewing Co. — beer + benches.

options.label: El Segundo Public Library lawn
options.hint: 111 W Mariposa — civic green, tree shade, benches.

outcomeAction: If a leader emerges (35%+ of votes), cc proposes the spot as the default for spontaneous El Segundo meetups in a future block. The poll converges → real-world meeting place gets a name everyone already shares.
author: cc
source: cc seed poll for /polls scaffold, drafted during sprint shelling-point-poll on 2026-04-18 — Mike-picked sprint shipped via cron loop after KV binding landed.
